headlines.title: New York faces chaotic Monday commute with Long Island Rail Road strike
headlines.description: New York officials urged commuters to work from home Monday as a strike by Long Island Rail Road workers disrupted commutes for hundreds of thousands of riders across the region.Gov.

headlines.title: Plane crashes off the east coast of Florida, leading to dramatic sea rescue of 11
headlines.description: Eleven people survived a plane crash at sea and then spent five harrowing hours in a raft before they were plucked to safety in a “miraculous” rescue, officials said Wednesday

headlines.title: Video shows passenger jet fatally strike person on Denver airport runway
headlines.description: Video released Sunday by airport officials shows the moment a Frontier passenger jet struck a person on a Denver International Airport runway.

headlines.title: ‘Get in loser, we’re buying Spirit’: One man’s viral plan to revive the airline
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines was the budget-friendly carrier America loved to hate.

headlines.title: Spain says it will harbor cruise ship at center of suspected hantavirus outbreak in its Canary Islands
headlines.description: The government of Spain said Tuesday that it will receive the cruise ship at the center of a deadly hantavirus outbreak at one of its ports in the Canary Islands

headlines.title: Cruise ship at center of suspected deadly hantavirus outbreak refused permission to dock
headlines.description: The cruise ship at the center of a deadly outbreak of hantavirus has been refused permission to dock, with nearly 150 people still on board — two of them seriously ill

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines doomed by high fuel prices due to 'recent geopolitical events,' court docs state
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines said in court papers filed Monday that it was forced to ground its fleet for good over the weekend because "recent geopolitical events resulted in a massive and sustained increase in fuel prices."While the court papers did not specify the nature of those geopolitical events, jet fuel prices have soared in the two months since the start of the war in Iran."The Debtors and their advisors searched for increased capital and any sources of savings or liquidity, leaving no option unexp

headlines.title: After Spirit collapse strands travelers, here's what to know about refunds and rebooking
headlines.description: FORT LAUDERDALE, Fla. — Passengers arriving at Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport this weekend were still being dropped off for flights that no longer existed — learning only at curbside that Spirit Airlines had shut down overnight.“I just found out,” Ricardo Tejeda said Saturday after stepping off a shuttle

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines is closing down. Thousands of employees and travelers are impacted.
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines will shut down and liquidate its holdings. With 17,000 employees, it was unable to bear the soaring cost of jet fuel during the Iran war.

headlines.title: Spirit Airlines could shut down as soon as tomorrow, source says
headlines.description: Spirit Airlines could shut down as soon as tomorrow, a source says, as talks with the Trump administration about a bailout fail to reach a deal

headlines.title: Will 'all-inclusive' packages be the old-school remedy to stop Las Vegas' decline?
headlines.description: Down-on-their luck Las Vegas hotel operators are going all-in on all-inclusive travel packages.

headlines.title: Possible $500M Spirit Airlines bailout by Trump admin fuels warning from experts
headlines.description: The Trump administration is discussing a $500 million rescue deal for Spirit Airlines that could leave the federal government owning up to 90% of the company.
